title: NEGG Technical Analysis - Support/Resistance Levels and Trend Analysis May 2026
text:
Newegg Commerce (NEGG) Technical Analysis Report - May 2026.

Current Price and Recent Technical Status: As of May 11th, Newegg Commerce stock trades at $25.38. NEGG is down 20.09% as of May 9, 2026, trading at $25.51.

Support and Resistance Levels: According to technical analysis sources, the resistance levels are R3: 93.843, R2: 87.852, R1: 83.203, with a pivot point at 77.212, and support levels at S1: 72.563, S2: 66.572, and S3: 61.923. Additionally, there will be some resistance from the lines at $50.14 and $56.64.

Technical Trend Analysis: Based on the share price being below its 5, 20 & 50 day exponential moving averages, the current trend is considered strongly bearish and NEGG is experiencing slight selling pressure. As long as price remains below the 102 resistance level, the working expectation is for one more leg down: either to re-test the September lows or potentially deeper into the 20–14.5 support zone.

Indicators: The MACD indicator is -1.73, suggesting a Sell, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is 42.84, suggesting the stock is oversold. The Bollinger Bands (25) range from 48.73 to 54.37, suggesting a Sell signal.
